title: Breaking into Impel Down
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Magellan, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as the scene develops across pages 6–9.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Magellan, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of breaking into impel down.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He'll be escorted from here tomorrow morning.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: One of the four emperors, kaidou....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...!! for something like this to happen...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The whole world can sense that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Impel Down, Level 3, Inside the Chimney

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: The inferno hell's down there, you know!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We want to escape here! Escape!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Yeah, we're trying to go up!! up!!

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: They're just little nothings with no balls.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Who're you calling a big nosed clown!!?

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: Hey, please stop....!! I'm gonna die!!!

summary: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Magellan, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of breaking into impel down.
